product_updates.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
product_updates.content: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.

product_updates.title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri’s highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
product_updates.content: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.

product_updates.title: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor
product_updates.content: Krishnan is reportedly starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy.

product_updates.title: The Trump administration might take an equity stake in OpenAI
product_updates.content: President Donald Trump said he's discussing deals "where the American people can benefit from the success of AI."
